Event: The Prince of Darkness Castle Siege

Black Beard Guardian Plate Mail

Once in a while, when the unit's health drops to the critical level, the unit restores 456300 health, removes all debuffs, and becomes immune to them for 4 sec. Also, the armor wearer restores 312500 health for 4 sec.

Requirements: 98-100
